Featured Projects

TechStart Platform

A comprehensive web application for startup management and collaboration.

Project Details

Client: TechStart Inc.

Date: 2024

Technologies: React, Node.js, PostgreSQL, AWS

Description: Built a full-stack platform enabling startup founders to manage projects, track funding, and collaborate with team members. Features include real-time notifications, project management tools, and investor networking capabilities.

Results: 500+ active users, 40% increase in user engagement after redesign

E-Commerce Store Redesign

Complete redesign and rebuilding of an existing e-commerce platform.

Project Details

Client: Creative Retail Co.

Date: 2024

Technologies: Vue.js, Shopify, Stripe

Description: Redesigned an aging e-commerce site with modern UI/UX principles. Implemented better product search, improved checkout flow, and integrated multiple payment options.

Results: 60% increase in conversion rates, 45% increase in average order value

Corporate Blog Platform

Custom blogging platform for a media company.

Project Details

Client: Digital Media Group

Date: 2023

Technologies: Jekyll, GitHub Pages, Netlify CMS

Description: Built a scalable blogging platform with easy content management. Integrated with analytics, social sharing, and email newsletter functionality.

Results: 100,000+ monthly visitors, 50+ active contributors

Case Studies

Case Study: From Outdated to Outstanding

Client: Legacy Manufacturing Company Challenge: Their website was 10 years old, not mobile-friendly, and losing customers to competitors.

Solution:

  • Complete redesign with modern aesthetics
  • Responsive mobile-first approach
  • Updated content management system
  • SEO optimization

Outcome:

  • 35% increase in website traffic
  • 50% increase in lead generation
  • 25% increase in sales within 6 months

Case Study: Scaling for Growth

Client: Startup SaaS Company Challenge: Their platform was experiencing performance issues as user base grew rapidly.

Solution:

  • Database optimization and indexing
  • Implemented caching strategies
  • Upgraded server infrastructure
  • Code refactoring for efficiency

Outcome:

  • 80% faster page load times
  • Reduced server costs by 30%
  • Improved user retention by 15%

Web Applications (8 projects)

Our custom web applications solve real business problems with powerful, scalable solutions.

  • Project management tools

  • Corporate websites
  • Landing pages
  • Portfolio sites
  • Blog platforms
  • Service showcase sites
  • Event websites
  • Product launch sites

E-Commerce Platforms (6 projects)

Fully-functional online stores that drive sales and customer satisfaction.

  • Shopify store redesigns
  • Custom e-commerce sites
  • Marketplace platforms
  • Product catalog systems
  • Inventory management
  • Multi-vendor platforms

Mobile & Progressive Web Apps (4 projects)

Apps that work seamlessly across all devices.

  • Progressive web applications (PWAs)
  • Mobile-responsive designs
  • Native mobile app concepts
  • Offline-capable applications
